title: Spicy Chewy Filipino Tofu Stew
description: A hearty and spicy Filipino tofu stew with chewy tofu cubes and a creamy coconut sour cream finish, perfect for a cozy meal.

ingredients.name: Firm tofu
ingredients.notes: Press to remove excess liquid, then cube

ingredients.name: Full-fat coconut sour cream
ingredients.notes: Unflavored, use as garnish or stir in at the end

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add sliced onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger; sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Add diced tomatoes and cook until they soften and release juices, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tofu cubes, then pour in coconut milk, soy sauce, vegetarian fish sauce, and sprinkle chili flakes. Mix gently to coat tofu.
Season with salt to taste. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the tofu absorbs the flavors and becomes slightly chewy.
Remove the pot from heat and stir in coconut sour cream until it melts and coats the stew.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot over steamed rice and garnish with fresh cilantro.
Enjoy a comforting, spicy tofu stew with a creamy finish!
